name: Cornerstone
description: Quarter-round cornerstones and discs interchanging on each redraw.

code.style: --form: @p('50% 50% 50% 50%', '100% 100% 0% 0%', '0% 0% 100% 100%', '100% 0% 0% 100%', '0% 100% 100% 0%', '0% 0% 0% 0%', '100% 0% 100% 0%', '0% 100% 0% 100%'); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); border-radius: var(--form); } -webkit-transition: ease 600ms; transition: ease 600ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
